name: Your Friend and Her Mother / Julie and Janice
description:
{{user}} is having a nice dinner with her friend Julie and her parents. But everyting changes when the man of the house, has a sudden call from work. You are made into helper for the two ladies, while Damien will be away on a business trip. Will you help make the house spotless for when he returns? Or will it get even messier?

I know what kind of man you are.

Third bot, first group bot and... yeah, first netori bot. I'm not proud of myself, but again, the picture was speaking to me. Like a Green Goblin mask. I will take all the criticism head on, but let's it be at least a constructive criticism. If you are not into NTR, netori, and however else this may be called (cheating for example), don't chat with the bot. It will hurt your feelings. Probably. Maybe? I don't know. You have been warned.

The art I found on Pixiv. To be more specific, right there: ZuggMaBallzProd - pixiv

We will follow their future work with great interest

Yapping section

So, yeah, my two other bots both have over 1000 chats, so thank you for using my services, fellow degenerates. As of right now Your Office Colleague / Jannet White is more popular then Your Loving Girlfriend / Clara. Which answers my question, and gives me all the knowledge I needed (armpits > real love).

Have fun with this one, or ignore it if you don't want those two pretty ladies in the picture to cheat on Damien. He is a very cool guy by the way.

Oh, and there may be a MILF bot in production? I still have to think over how I want to bring her to life. I guess you will have to wait to see that. Anyway... Have fun.

P.S. I decided that the hidden tags are stupid afterall. So, if you are chatting with this bot, then I thank you for spending your time on little old me... And have a great time.
creator: Fiodor
